commits:
[{'sha': 'e142b13b19137a4d2d65373e8bb5a65bc41efd64', 'message': 'Document that spring.profiles.active is ignored by TCF

The Test Context Framework does not honor the
spring.profiles.active system property when determining
active profiles for a test class.

This commit documents that behavior in the @ActiveProfiles
and DefaultActiveProfilesResolver Javadoc, as well as in
the reference manual. A SystemPropertyActiveProfilesResolver
example is also added showing how to allow
spring.profiles.active to override @ActiveProfiles.

Closes gh-36269

Signed-off-by: Mohak Nagaraju <98132980+Mohak-Nagaraju@users.noreply.github.com>'}]
review_comments:
["It actually is taken into account if you don't declare `@ActiveProfiles` -- right?", "Although it is usually set as a JVM system property, it's also supported as an environment variable. So, we should revise the wording here.", 'Again JVM system property vs. Spring property.

It might be easiest to refer to it as a Spring property and link to the Spring Properties section in the appendix, like we do in other places.', 'Naming is hard. 😉 

Perhaps `SpringPropertyOverrideActiveProfilesResolver`?

Got any better ideas?', "Same as my first comment.

> It actually is taken into account if you don't declare `@ActiveProfiles` -- right?", "For some reason I was thinking this could also be set as a Spring property, but that's not the case. So please disregard related comments.", "Thanks for the PR and for basing it on 7.0.x.

I've requested a few minor changes.", "> The Test Context Framework does not honor the `spring.profiles.active` system property when determining active profiles for a test class.

In line with comments I left in the review, I've modified the title of this PR to reflect that it's the default behavior of `@ActiveProfiles` which does not honor that Spring property."]

commits:
[{'sha': '4c23dd00ca0c9893beae386c176866a0f8cb26c7', 'message': 'Support @HttpExchange in MvcUriComponentsBuilder

MvcUriComponentsBuilder now recognizes @HttpExchange and composed
annotations such as @GetExchange in addition to @RequestMapping when
resolving class- and method-level mappings.

This allows controllers that implement @HttpExchange interfaces to use
fromController(), fromMethodName(), and fromMethodCall() to build links.

Closes gh-36235

Signed-off-by: Daeho Kwon <trewq231@naver.com>'}]
review_comments: ["Nice fix! Using `AnnotatedElementUtils` here seems right to make sure it picks up on the `httpExchange` mappings when they're defined on the parents interface which is how the docs suggest using them. Nice testing too especially on the `PersonHttpExchangeControllerImpl` to verify the inheritance works as expected. Also nice on  updating the error message to include `httpExchange` which will save time debugging."]

review: [{'type': 'Rightness', 'conclusion': '修复了ClassFile方法元数据中原始类型和数组类型的返回类型名称问题。', 'description': '代码变更的主要目的是修复在使用ClassFile API解析方法元数据时，原始类型（如int）和数组类型（如int[]）的返回类型名称不正确的问题。变更通过引入一个统一的`resolveTypeName`辅助方法来处理类型描述符到类型名称的转换，并修复了`toString`、`equals`和`hashCode`方法的实现。同时，扩展了测试用例以覆盖这些场景。', 'evidence': '', 'advice': '', 'confidence': 1.0, 'severity': 'Low'}]
commits:
[{'sha': 'b01fdb01408499bf9c73de1e927017b4870ffe26', 'message': 'Fix ClassFileMethodMetadata return type names for primitives and arrays

Return correct names for primitive and array types
Introduce resolveTypeName helper for ClassDesc handling
Add ClassFileMethodMetadataTests (java24Test)
Extend AbstractMethodMetadataTests with void return case

See gh-36577

Signed-off-by: Junseo Bae <ferrater1013@gmail.com>'}, {'sha': '40ef6f68726521752ff030490eb9d658c97ee265', 'message': 'Fix method and annotation metadata for ClassFile variant

Prior to this commit, the ClassFile variant for  annotation and method
metadata would report incorrect metadata for:
* the method return type names in case of primitives and array types
* `toString` values for methods
* `equals` and `hashcode` information for methods

This commit expands the test suite and ensures that the ASM and
ClassFile variants are aligned.

Fixes gh-36577

Signed-off-by: Brian Clozel <brian.clozel@broadcom.com>'}]

review:
[{'type': 'Design', 'conclusion': '为多个已弃用的方法添加了 `forRemoval = true` 标记，明确其将在未来版本中移除。', 'description': '代码变更统一为多个已标记为 `@Deprecated` 的方法添加了 `forRemoval = true` 属性。这是一个标准的 API 弃用管理实践，旨在向开发者发出更明确的信号，表明这些方法不仅不推荐使用，而且计划在未来的主要版本（如 7.0）中被移除。这有助于开发者提前规划迁移，避免在升级时遇到破坏性变更。', 'evidence': '@@ -148,7 +148,7 @@ public HttpStatusCode getStatusCode() {
 	 * @deprecated as of 6.0, in favor of {@link #getStatusCode()}; scheduled
 	 * for removal in 7.0
 	 */
-	@Deprecated(since = "6.0")
+	@Deprecated(since = "6.0", forRemoval = true)', 'advice': '变更符合 Java 弃用注解的最佳实践。建议确保所有相关的 Javadoc `@deprecated` 标签中的描述（如“scheduled for removal in 7.0”）与 `forRemoval = true` 的意图保持一致，当前代码已经做到这一点。', 'confidence': 1.0, 'severity': 'Low'}]

review:
[{'type': 'Readability', 'conclusion': '增强FieldError类的Javadoc，澄清defaultMessage参数的性质', 'description': "代码变更主要更新了FieldError构造函数的Javadoc注释，将'defaultMessage'的描述从'用于解析此消息的默认消息'改为'用于解析此消息的静态默认消息'，并明确说明'codes'参数应该是应用程序中的i18n键。这些修改旨在澄清一个常见的误解：defaultMessage不是来自应用程序资源包的i18n键，而是一个静态字符串。如果设置了defaultMessage，就意味着没有国际化支持；要实现国际化，应该使用code参数。", 'evidence': '@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@ public class FieldError extends ObjectError {
 	 * Create a new FieldError instance.
 	 * @param objectName the name of the affected object
 	 * @param field the affected field of the object
-	 * @param defaultMessage the default message to be used to resolve this message
+	 * @param defaultMessage the static default message to be used to resolve this message
  */
@@ -60,9 +60,9 @@ public class FieldError(String objectName, String field, String defaultMessage)
 	 * @param rejectedValue the rejected field value
 	 * @param bindingFailure whether this error represents a binding failure
 	 * (like a type mismatch); else, it is a validation failure
-	 * @param codes the codes to be used to resolve this message
+	 * @param codes the codes to be used to resolve this message. These should be i18n keys in your application
 	 * @param arguments the array of arguments to be used to resolve this message
-	 * @param defaultMessage the default message to be used to resolve this message
+	 * @param defaultMessage the static default message to be used to resolve this message', 'advice': '这是一个很好的文档改进，有助于防止开发者误解API的预期用法。建议考虑是否需要在其他相关类（如ObjectError）中也进行类似的文档澄清，以确保整个验证框架的文档一致性。', 'confidence': 1.0, 'severity': 'Low'}]
commits:
[{'sha': '2508ca9bf0606eaa92b762cffe571434f7e2b5f0', 'message': "Augment FieldError.java's javadoc

to make clearer that defaultMessage is not a i18n key from your application bundle, but a static string.
Resulting in a problem that setting defaultMessage means no i18n. If you want i18n you should use the code parameter.

Behaviour shown in:
* https://github.com/ottlinger/custom-validation-messages-1029
* reported and resolved via https://github.com/thymeleaf/thymeleaf/issues/1029

Signed-off-by: P. Ottlinger <ottlinger@users.noreply.github.com>"}]
review_comments: ["Simple but effective change. By adding 'static' to the defaultMessage description it helps to prevent from accidentally passing translation keys into the wrong parameter.\n"]
